track.name: Lady Brown (feat. Cise Starr from CYNE)

wiki.summary: "Lady Brown" is a single release, by Japanese hip-hop producer Nujabes. The single was released in 12" vinyl and sold in Nujabes' own record stores 'Tribe' located in Tokyo. The single featured Cise Starr from Cyne and Nao Tokui. Lady Brown was featured on Nujabes' first solo album Metaphorical Music. The song is originally sampled from Luiz Bonfa's "Shade of The Mango Tree" from Bonfa Burrows Brazil 1978. The record was recorded, mixed, and mastered at Park Avenue Studios. Read more on Last.fm.
